summary: Completed testing of Projects module enhancements: currency field (CHF/EUR/USD), monthly hours endpoints, and summary cards. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Created test projects via pytest: TEST_Project_CHF, TEST_Project_EUR, TEST_Project_USD, TEST_Project_Default_Currency, TEST_Project_Update_Currency, TEST_CRUD_Currency_Project. Created via UI: TEST_Playwright_EUR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects module enhancements verified working. All project cards now display 3 summary cards: Budget total (blue), Taux horaire (green), Heures ce mois (orange). Currency selector (CHF/EUR/USD) works in both create and edit modals. GET /api/projects/monthly-hours returns dict of project_id -> hours. GET /api/projects/{id}/monthly-hours returns detailed data with cost and currency. Existing LOGITRAK project has budget=50000, rate=85, hours=95.87h this month.

backend.POST_projects_with_CHF: PASS - Creates project with CHF currency
backend.POST_projects_with_EUR: PASS - Creates project with EUR currency
backend.POST_projects_with_USD: PASS - Creates project with USD currency
backend.POST_projects_default_currency: PASS - Defaults to CHF when not specified

backend.GET_projects_monthly_hours_detail: PASS - Returns total_hours, billable_hours, cost, currency

backend.projects_have_hourly_rate_field: PASS - All projects have numeric hourly_rate
